organization.name: Oumou Group
organization.description: Oumou Group is a Senegal-based technology and innovation company with over twenty years of experience in digital infrastructure and transformation. The organization supports governments, institutions, and private sector actors in building solutions tailored to African and international contexts. Within the digital domain, Oumou Group is actively contributing to the development of sovereign digital identity ecosystems. Through initiatives such as the Uwangu wallet, the group explores the use of verifiable credentials and wallet-based architectures aligned with open frameworks such as GovStack, aiming to enable secure, interoperable, and inclusive digital services. Operating from Senegal with a growing presence across multiple African countries, Oumou Group combines technological innovation with a strong commitment to social impact, contributing to sustainable development in areas such as education, public services, and economic resilience.
